name: [bot]
description: Item raised by GitHub Action or other automatic process

name: build
description: Item deals with the build system or external dependencies

name: chore
description: Other changes that don't modify src, test, or doc files

name: fix
description: Item fixes a problem with the project

name: refactor
description: A change which represents neither a bugfix nor feature

name: test
description: Item deals with unit or other tests
